name: Cloudflare

composio_registry_match.name: Cloudflare
composio_registry_match.description: Cloudflare is a global network designed to make everything you connect to the Internet secure, private, fast, and reliable.

description: A global cloud platform providing CDN, edge computing, security, and networking services for developers and organizations.
notes: Cloudflare provides extensive API coverage for almost all service management tasks. MCP servers for Cloudflare exist in the open-source community (e.g., via ModelContextProtocol organization). [human-verified: Both confirmed. API Token recommended. Free tier available. Instant dashboard access.]
